155756769.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_C

695145148.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST

377062705.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A

377062705.en_literal: Don't let your guard down until the very end!

825870243.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
825870243.jp_real: ここで決着といたしましょう！
825870243.english: And now, we arrive at the final scene!

821186415.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A

453760336.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B

773555511.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C

773555511.en_literal: It's about time you got some rest.

42593321.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST

42593321.en_literal: Targeting the legs is the theory, isn't it?

675681364.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
675681364.jp_real: 先へ進ませていただきます！
675681364.en_literal: I'll go ahead and lead the way!

980598316.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
980598316.jp_real: 連携ならば、今の私たちの方が

621709298.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C

621709298.en_literal: This is it! Maglielle's Link Special!
621709298.english: This is the true Especial de Maglielle!

209520450.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
209520450.jp_real: とにかく、最善を尽くすまで！

735147111.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A

735147111.en_literal: That's why I understand your feelings.

99172121.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B

679968248.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C

829918608.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST

829918608.english: So you thought to affirm your raison d'être by completing your mission?

48078220.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A

720838311.english: I can't bear to see you suffer any longer.

186720314.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST

186720314.english: You would go to such lengths... Your heart is clear.

825188302.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST

458009945.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A

458009945.english: A blade bereft of spirit shan't pierce me!

1000043729.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B

1000043729.english: Your attacks are as empty as your husk!

192701092.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C

253518538.english: One might mistake it as a primeval god, if not for its lack of life.

645949849.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A

645949849.en_literal: I have no intention of losing!

579391363.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_C

579391363.english: Let us join blades and strike!

478589964.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
478589964.en_literal: Ido... So you're one of them too.

647193498.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST

647193498.en_literal: What a shameless display of power!

802542535.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_B

802542535.english: Our fiery spirits shall subdue the chill, won't they, Gallo?

751269628.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_C
751269628.jp_real: 結末を見届けるといたしましょう
751269628.en_literal: I shall see you to the very end.

937257899.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_C

937257899.english: Fancy a final dance with me?

597733443.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST

597733443.en_literal: The dance party is finally about to begin.
597733443.english: Our Waltz of Warriors reaches its climax!

486561197.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A

486561197.en_literal: I won't let you have your way.

376394246.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B

18552143.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C

917764205.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST

917764205.english: Perhaps it's time we form our own Link Espécial!

685061145.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_A

685061145.english: Don't let up! Pierce our foes!

33582026.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B

33582026.english: Do be darlings and stand down!

238737688.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C

923846440.english: Ugh. What a delightful little place.

839888497.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B

787092105.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST

787092105.en_literal: I won't let you stop me!

287222921.en_literal: Everyone, that was a magnificent display!

804058262.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_1

804058262.en_literal: That was a splendid display of teamwork, everyone!

962612775.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_2

732099082.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3

452959256.en_literal: Glad I could be of help.

515847187.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3

515847187.en_literal: Then, let's move on to the next show.
515847187.english: Now on to the next act!

821495166.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_1

566364784.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_3

566364784.en_literal: Hehehe. Now, let's prepare for the next one.

320876280.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_C_2

551672458.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_C_3
551672458.en_literal: Hehehe, that's quite something, isn't it?

458631457.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300

381567784.en_literal: Oh, I'm glad to hear you're doing well.

459754624.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0300

638911215.en_literal: It's pure and beautiful magic. It's wonderful.
638911215.english: Such elegant, refined magic. I'm impressed, Io.

1036760559.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0500

961826260.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0600

384244442.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0700

36272385.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100

878307512.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200

878307512.en_literal: Thank you for your cooperation, Charlotte.
878307512.english: Thank you for your cooperation, Dame Charlotta!

999944820.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
999944820.jp_real: ヨダルラーハ様、いつのまに突撃なさったのです？
999944820.english: When did you join the fray?

148975066.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1400
148975066.jp_real: カレーに決まりましたわ！

827087350.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
827087350.jp_real: なんと豪快な追撃でしょう！

639811157.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1600
639811157.jp_real: 今のリズムを維持しましょう

157848379.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1700

157848379.english: Even for a giraffe, your strength is something else!

1064214738.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1800
1064214738.jp_real: 今の連戦、目を見張る早技ですこと。
1064214738.en_literal: This training... is a move that sees beyond the eyes.
1064214738.english: I wasn't aware alchemy could be so swift.

374448050.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1900
374448050.jp_real: さすがに息が合いますわね
374448050.en_literal: You're quite in sync, aren't you?
374448050.english: We make quite the duet, don't we?

905174473.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2100
905174473.jp_real: パーフェクトな連携でしたわね

505401005.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
505401005.jp_real: まあ、天星剣王の名は伊達ではありませんのね。
505401005.en_literal: Well, the title of 'Heavenly Sword King' is no mere facade, is it?
505401005.english: Oh, I see you've earned your title, Star-Sword Sovereign!

155873969.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
155873969.jp_real: さすがは十天衆。的確な追撃ですわね。
155873969.en_literal: As expected of the Ten Master. Your twin strikes are precise.
155873969.english: An eternal never disappoints. Excellent follow-through.

1000837792.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
1000837792.jp_real: マギラリンクスペシャル、カレーに決まりましたわ！
1000837792.en_literal: Magilare Link Special! It's decided to be curry!
1000837792.english: Thou hast borne witness to my especial de Maglielle!

171470122.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2600
171470122.jp_real: なるほど。因果を喰らう剣ですか。
171470122.en_literal: I see. So that's the sword that crushes cause and effect.
171470122.english: So your sword... it feasts on fate, does it?

803920736.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2700
803920736.jp_real: すさましい雷撃ですこと！

763291912.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
763291912.jp_real: 連携にも慣れていらっしゃるのですね
763291912.en_literal: You're getting used to linking up, I see.
763291912.english: Seems you've grown accustomed to teamwork.

680191734.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
680191734.jp_real: ありがとうございます。フェディエル様。

511851012.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B
511851012.jp_real: 悪くない連携でしたわ

623048252.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_3
623048252.en_literal: We're in sync now, aren't we?

786531467.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
786531467.jp_real: 合わせにくいようでしたら、ごめんあそばせ？
786531467.en_literal: If it was hard to coordinate, I'm sorry for the trouble.
786531467.english: Apologies, I'm a tough act to follow.

608389294.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0000
608389294.jp_real: 次はもっとテンポを上げますわよ。
608389294.english: Shall we pick up the tempo?

861126946.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0200
861126946.jp_real: 騎士の矜持、しかと拝見いたしました。
861126946.en_literal: Knight's teacher, I have seen it.
861126946.english: Perhaps none embody a knight's honor as well as you.

569887748.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
569887748.jp_real: 銃の扱いも得意なのですね
569887748.en_literal: You're quite skilled with firearms, then.

609106570.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
609106570.jp_real: なんと鋭い一撃なのでしょう

730027177.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
730027177.jp_real: まあ、格調高い交友ですわね。
730027177.en_literal: Well, what an extravagant display of friendship.
730027177.english: What a refined aroma! Excellent taste, my dear!

479951231.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
479951231.jp_real: フェリさん、援護に感謝いたします。
479951231.en_literal: Ferry-san, thank you for your support.
479951231.english: Thank you for the support, Ferry!

868941689.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800
868941689.jp_real: さらにテンポを上げましょう！ついてこられますか？
868941689.en_literal: Let's speed things up. Can you keep up?
868941689.english: Shall we up the tempo? But only if you can manage it.

794310520.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0900
794310520.jp_real: さあ、一気に畳みかけましょう！
794310520.en_literal: Let's overwhelm them all at once!
794310520.english: Now, crush them under your heel!

419986318.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
419986318.jp_real: 熱い想いが伝わってくるよ
419986318.en_literal: I can feel your passionate determination.
419986318.english: The heat of your passion is a sight to behold!

102859474.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
102859474.jp_real: 英雄とのデュエットとは、光栄ですわ。
102859474.en_literal: A duet with a hero... what an honor.
102859474.english: What an honor to dance this duet with a true hero!

903288000.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1200
903288000.jp_real: 頼もしいほどの力強さですね。
903288000.english: You're as strong as you are steadfast!

407340657.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
407340657.jp_real: 援護に感謝いたしますわ、おじいさま。
407340657.en_literal: Thank you for your protection, Grandfather.
407340657.english: How I appreciate your reinforcement, Yodarha!

902052109.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
902052109.jp_real: 可憐に見えて、何という圧巻なのでしょう。
902052109.en_literal: It looks like lightning... what kind of oppression is this?
902052109.english: You look like the flower, but are the serpent underneath.

786656169.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
786656169.jp_real: 私は今、伝説と肩を並べているのですね。
786656169.en_literal: I'm standing shoulder to shoulder with legends now.
786656169.english: To think I'm able to fight alongside a living legend!

242792208.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
242792208.jp_real: まあ、すさまじい威力ですこと
242792208.en_literal: Well, you've got quite the impressive power, then.
242792208.english: My, what a fearsome presence you have!

180570437.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
180570437.jp_real: あっ、少々よろめいてしまいました。
180570437.en_literal: I'm a bit flustered right now.
180570437.english: Oh my, now I feel positively dizzy!

255988970.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2100
255988970.jp_real: あら、優雅の一撃ですこと

656908962.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
656908962.jp_real: 文字通り透き通った精悍な剣の数々。思わず目移りしてしまいそうですわ。
656908962.en_literal: A dazzling array of swords, as if made of pure gold. I can't help but be dazzled by them.
656908962.english: Such majestic swords! And multitudes of them no less! I find myself positively enraptured!

1011246399.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
1011246399.jp_real: 無数の剣と矢が織りなすアンサンブル。お気に召しました？
1011246399.en_literal: An ensemble of countless swords and arrows. Please enjoy.
1011246399.english: Ah, the fanfare of blades and arrows! What a spectacular melody!

253075291.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
253075291.jp_real: ハガサネとハクロウの無欠の連携！
253075291.en_literal: The unyielding link between the silver blade and the white dragon!
253075291.english: When Veil and Wolf hunt as a pack!

655359582.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2600
655359582.jp_real: 少々乱暴でしたが、手応えあったようです。
655359582.en_literal: It was a bit rough, but it felt satisfying.
655359582.english: That was a bit boisterous, but it certainly got the job done.

184292378.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
184292378.jp_real: フラメクのイカズチ、もっと近くで拝見しても？
184292378.en_literal: The lightning of Fulamek. Would you like to see it up close?
184292378.english: Might I borrow Flamemac for inspection, you see?

437418435.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2800
437418435.jp_real: まあ、華やかなステップですこと

603180681.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
603180681.jp_real: すさまじい力の奔流ですこと！
603180681.en_literal: It's the true source of tremendous power.
603180681.english: What a tremendous display of power!

118216335.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C

68993471.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_2
68993471.jp_real: まだまだ気は抜けませんわ

784581509.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_3

980968762.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300

980968762.en_literal: So this is... the power of the people of the stars?
980968762.english: I see it now. Astrals are indeed formidable.

679388877.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0000
679388877.jp_real: エオスの剣、興味深いですわね。
679388877.english: Might I have a closer look at the Sword of Eos?

739069826.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0200

739069826.en_literal: So, the dance party's really picking up!
739069826.english: The sword veil could cut their teeth on these rabble!

897773068.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300

897773068.en_literal: Let's prepare for the next show.
897773068.english: Now, shall we proceed to the final act?

345112086.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0400

345112086.english: Oh, blades of yore, encircle our foes and sunder them in twain!

445015701.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0500
445015701.jp_real: 援護射撃、実に見事でした。
445015701.english: Perfect cover fire! Let us see more!

676175842.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
676175842.jp_real: 美しい術に、思わず見とれてしまいそうでした。
676175842.en_literal: I was about to be entranced by your beautiful magic.
676175842.english: You fight beautifully. I find myself almost bewitched.

946647015.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
946647015.jp_real: 流れるような追撃、お見事です！
946647015.en_literal: A pursuit that flows like a river. Marvelous.
946647015.english: Blade and Whip, an effective combination!

609750437.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
609750437.jp_real: さあ、次の舞台に参りましょう！
609750437.en_literal: Then, let's move on to the next stage.
609750437.english: Come, knight! The next stage awaits!

868007178.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
868007178.jp_real: ヴェイン殿。ご心配には及びませんよ。
868007178.english: Vane, I am not so fragile as to require constant protection.

576253404.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
576253404.jp_real: エンテイのナワだけではないようですわね
576253404.en_literal: It seems your name is more than just "Endless".
576253404.english: I see why you're called the Lord of Flames!

275281723.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
275281723.jp_real: 追撃に感謝いたしますわ、ジークフリート殿。
275281723.en_literal: I thank you for the onslaught, Siegfried.
275281723.english: Once more, I find myself in your debt, Sir Siegfried!

310882760.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1200
310882760.jp_real: はがさねの負け争奪の前に敵なしですわ
310882760.en_literal: Before the final showdown, there's no enemy.
310882760.english: You see, the Swordveil's mastery of bladecraft is without parallel.

711888556.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
711888556.jp_real: あら、手が滑ってしまいました。

929842654.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
929842654.jp_real: 魔剣と骨杖の舞、美しい連携でした。
929842654.en_literal: The clash of the demon's hammer and the spear of legends... what a beautiful synergy.
929842654.english: Ensorcelled Blade and Fluttering Sword, quite the beautiful pair.

897264818.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
897264818.jp_real: この勢いで、次の舞台へ！
897264818.en_literal: With this momentum, to the next stage!
897264818.english: Do bring that vigor to the next stage!

282860363.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600

282860363.english: I sense a measure of elegance behind your spearwork.

803346597.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1700
803346597.jp_real: きっとそのオウガマにも、数多の想いが込められているのでしょう。
803346597.en_literal: That Ogham must surely hold countless thoughts within it.
803346597.english: You wield that scythe so deftly, yet I sense great burdens buried within.

405923596.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
405923596.jp_real: 支援に感謝いたします。カリオストロさん。
405923596.en_literal: Thank you for your support, Cagliostro.
405923596.english: Thank you for the follow-up, Cagliostro!

1004354912.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
1004354912.jp_real: 今のは少々踏み込みが甘かったのでは？
1004354912.en_literal: Was that not a bit too soft of a move?
1004354912.english: Perhaps your last strike was a bit too indulgent.

445967594.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
445967594.jp_real: その剣に、とても大切なものなのですね。
445967594.en_literal: That lance... it must be very precious to you.
445967594.english: That sword of yours... You must cherish it greatly.

923727080.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
923727080.jp_real: ただいまの舞台は、鋼の衆筆頭マギラ・フリラと
923727080.en_literal: The stage is set for a dazzling display of "Hammer of Thunder," "Pistol of Demons," "Spear of Legends," "Battle Hymn," "Nachtmusik," "Paeanic Aegis," "Sostenuto," "Stave of Divinity," and "Symphony Superior."
923727080.english: Closing this act, our Maglielle, commander of the Swordveil Fellowship, and...

344482458.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
344482458.jp_real: 思ったところに矢が飛んできますのね
344482458.en_literal: Arrows fly right where I expect them to.
344482458.english: Your arrows came just in the nick of time!

551336436.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
551336436.jp_real: あら、独特なステップですこと
551336436.english: Where did you learn such fanciful footwork?

804123342.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
804123342.jp_real: お見事！次の連携にも期待させてくださいませ。
804123342.en_literal: Excellent! Please let me know when we're ready for the next link.
804123342.english: Perfection! I do hope to see more of your handiwork in the future!

1052118585.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700

1052118585.en_literal: I'm sorry. I'm so glad you're okay.
1052118585.english: Your support is most reassuring! Thank you!

827044289.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800

827044289.en_literal: Could this be called a single flower blooming on the battlefield?
827044289.english: Gorgeous! Like a flower blooming upon the battlefield!

869263664.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
869263664.jp_real: 次の休憩時間に紅茶をふるまいましょう。
869263664.en_literal: Let's have tea at the next break.
869263664.english: I say we do black tea for our next soiree!

571306940.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A
571306940.jp_real: お褒めに預かり光栄です！
571306940.en_literal: It is my honor to be entrusted with your praise.

921949426.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
921949426.jp_real: いいえ、どうかお気になさらず。
921949426.en_literal: No, please don't worry about it.

237567990.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0000
237567990.jp_real: ほめ言葉として受け取っておきますわね
237567990.en_literal: I'll take that as a compliment.
237567990.english: Your words of praise honor me!

689514548.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
689514548.jp_real: あら、カタリナ殿の魔法剣も素敵でしたわ。
689514548.en_literal: Oh, Lady Katalina's magic sword was quite lovely too.
689514548.english: Ah, but your magic sword is a work of art too, my dear!

1023583528.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
1023583528.english: Shall we crank up the tempo?

215897047.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0400
215897047.jp_real: 当然ですわ。スペリオールの名をいただく奇跡の剣聖なのですから。
215897047.en_literal: Of course. It's a miraculous gift worthy of the name 'Superior'.
215897047.english: Very good, Io! That is the proper way to address a superlative weapon!

282215726.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
282215726.jp_real: 刃花銃が必見。ご堪能いただけまして？
282215726.en_literal: The blade of steel is a must-have. May I have your indulgence?
282215726.english: The veil's secret technique is quite the sight, no?

98799723.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0600
98799723.jp_real: ええ、この調子で第二幕に備えましょう。
98799723.en_literal: Hey! Let's keep this momentum going into Act 2!
98799723.english: Indeed, let us carry this energy into Act Two!

306565192.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0700
306565192.jp_real: ええ、次の一幕にもご期待くださいませ。
306565192.en_literal: Yes! Please look forward to the next act!
306565192.english: Not to worry! My next performance is coming soon!

373290455.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
373290455.jp_real: エスコートしてくださいませ
373290455.english: I shall take that as a compliment.

425654355.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
425654355.jp_real: お褒めに預かり光栄ですわ、ヴェイン殿。
425654355.en_literal: It's an honor to be entrusted with such praise, Vane-dono.
425654355.english: I appreciate the kind words, sir Vane!

962091714.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
962091714.jp_real: 心配はご無用。どうぞご遠慮なさらず。
962091714.en_literal: No need to worry. Please go ahead.
962091714.english: Oh, I very much doubt that flame as you'd like!

454286163.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
454286163.jp_real: いえ、お礼をいただくほどのことではございません。
454286163.en_literal: No, it's nothing worth a thank you.

505890341.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
505890341.jp_real: 変幻自在と言われるヨダルラーハ殿の剣、参考にさせていただきますわ。
505890341.en_literal: I'll take a reference from your sword, Yodarha, which is said to be a divine weapon.
505890341.english: At least my blades don't move faster than the eye can follow. How do you achieve that speed?

876566308.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
876566308.jp_real: この流れを維持して参りましょう。
876566308.english: Let's press on while we have the advantage!

943262751.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
943262751.jp_real: どうぞ気兼ねなく打ち込んでいってくださいまし
943262751.en_literal: Please, go ahead and attack without hesitation.
943262751.english: Well, when the mood strikes, one must bring the storm!

483834615.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
483834615.jp_real: ちょっとゼタさん、そのお話後ほど詳細を
483834615.en_literal: Hold on, Zeta. Let's talk about that later.
483834615.english: Dearest Zeta, we'll kindly discuss this matter later.

209446224.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
209446224.jp_real: 覚悟を練り込んだ一撃。お見事ですわ。
209446224.en_literal: A strike forged with resolve. Marvelous, isn't it?
209446224.english: Your will does not waver, nor your blade.

396380497.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
396380497.jp_real: な、なんでしょう。少々寒気が…
396380497.en_literal: What is it? I'm feeling a bit chilly.
396380497.english: Does it suddenly feel suffocating to anyone else?

1002117042.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900
1002117042.jp_real: イド、もう少し頼っても構いませんのよ。
1002117042.en_literal: Id, it's okay to lean on me a little more.
1002117042.english: Id, you can always talk to me if you need to.

69943246.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
69943246.english: It wasn't even my finest display.

828507193.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
828507193.jp_real: 面白いでしょうか？面白い？

499554816.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
499554816.jp_real: かの十天衆にお褒めいただけるなんて、喜ばしい限りですわ。
499554816.en_literal: To be praised by the Ten-Point Master is truly an honor.
499554816.english: To think an eternal would grace me with such praise... I'm elated!

884431766.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
884431766.english: Where is my due credit, you glory hog?

391657631.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
391657631.english: We were in perfect sync, were we not?

205174354.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
205174354.jp_real: これぞハガサネの真剣勝負
205174354.en_literal: This is the ultimate clash of styles!
205174354.english: 'Twas only the blade work of the sword Veil.

577257394.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
577257394.jp_real: それはお互い様ですわ
577257394.english: I could say the same of you, my dear.

425739509.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
425739509.jp_real: 気に入っていただけて何よりですわ
425739509.english: I'm just pleased to have your favor.

14355084.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B
14355084.jp_real: 頼もしい限りですわね

786473062.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_2
786473062.jp_real: このまま押し切らせていただきます！
786473062.english: They'll fall to our superior weaponry!

105310613.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
105310613.jp_real: どうやら違いの分かるお方のようですわね。
105310613.en_literal: Hehe, you seem to be quite the discerning one, aren't you?
105310613.english: Finally, someone who has a little taste!

333272131.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0000
333272131.jp_real: ええ、臨むところですが
333272131.en_literal: Eh, I'd be happy to help.
333272131.english: I look forward to seeing your growth.

975602543.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
975602543.jp_real: ダテに刃重ねの頭目を務めてはおりませんから
975602543.en_literal: I'm not here to be a mere ornament.
975602543.english: Combat proficiency is required to helm the fellowship.

954775225.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
954775225.jp_real: ラカムさん、あまり無茶はなさいませぬよう
954775225.english: Rackam, might I suggest not charging into certain death?

396613691.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
396613691.jp_real: えっ？う、う悪い気はしませんわね。
396613691.en_literal: Huh? I don't have a bad feeling about this...
396613691.english: Oh, me? I've never been so flattered!

857134587.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
857134587.jp_real: お気に召していただけまして？
857134587.english: I disagree. One must always strive for eternal perfection.

195073582.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
195073582.jp_real: 剣の舞は華やかに、ですが
195073582.en_literal: The sword's dance is dazzling, isn't it?
195073582.english: Then let my blades shine even more brilliantly!

669506860.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
669506860.jp_real: フェリさん、見事な立ち居振る舞いでしたわ。
669506860.en_literal: Ferry-san, that was quite a performance.
669506860.english: That's right, Ferry! Wield your whip like a maestro!

7501140.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
7501140.jp_real: それは秘密です。その方が物語の魅力は増すでしょう？
7501140.en_literal: That's a secret. It makes the story more exciting, don't you think?
7501140.english: You may not. Legends grow best when shrouded in secrecy.

217890591.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900
217890591.jp_real: ええ、私も遅れは取りません。
217890591.en_literal: Eh! I won't fall behind either!

281041133.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
281041133.jp_real: 破かさねの技を侮らぬよう
281041133.en_literal: I won't let you have the edge.
281041133.english: Do not belittle the swordplay of the veil.

91476556.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
91476556.jp_real: はがさねのひにとくとごしょうらんあれ
91476556.en_literal: I have a special request for you on this day of purification.
91476556.english: Feel free to observe the veil's arts all you like!

1022548159.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
1022548159.jp_real: ええ、実にはなやかな連携でした。
1022548159.en_literal: That was quite a dazzling collaboration.
1022548159.english: Indeed, we make a brilliant combination!

871017367.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
871017367.jp_real: 姫！わ、悪くない響きですわね！
871017367.en_literal: Hime... That's not a bad sound at all.
871017367.english: Princess? I rather like the sound of that.

548471621.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
548471621.jp_real: 少々先読みが過ぎたでしょうか。
548471621.en_literal: Heh heh... did I get a little ahead of myself?
548471621.english: Was I a little too eager?

468485845.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
468485845.jp_real: 私が格闘を？できるかしら。チュチュ。
468485845.en_literal: I wonder if I can fight...?
468485845.english: Me? A martial artist? Let me try.

385601875.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1600
385601875.jp_real: その勝負、受けて立ちましょう！
385601875.english: Pancakes? A bold challenge! I gladly accept!

536366208.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
536366208.jp_real: バザラガさん、礼には及びませんわ。
536366208.en_literal: Vaseraga-san, I won't call you by your title.

142256084.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
142256084.jp_real: あははは。あなた方はすでに嫌というほどご存知でしょうけど。
142256084.en_literal: Hehe... I'm sure you already know me all too well.
142256084.english: I see what you're insinuating, and no, you may not study me.

659197542.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
659197542.english: Don't be silly. I do the protecting around here.

835538671.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
835538671.jp_real: ええ、どこからでも合わせて見せましょう。
835538671.en_literal: Eh? Let's show them how to match up from anywhere!
835538671.english: Yes, I shall join your assault no matter where it's launched!

779325894.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
779325894.jp_real: お膳立てしておいて何を言います
779325894.en_literal: I've got your back. What are you trying to say?
779325894.english: You laid the groundwork. I merely followed.

570038493.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
570038493.jp_real: まあ、球術だけでなく基地にもお方ですのね。
570038493.en_literal: Well, you're not just a healer—you're quite the strategist too.
570038493.english: How sharp! I've never heard jokes scimitar to that one!

95786539.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
95786539.jp_real: ええ、いつでも準備はできております。
95786539.english: Fear not! I stand ever at the ready!

1004313589.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
1004313589.jp_real: えっ、まだまだ序章に過ぎません。
1004313589.en_literal: Eh? It's still just a mere prelude.
1004313589.english: Look alive, dear! We've but finished the opening act!

67541619.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2700
67541619.jp_real: 承知いたしました。ユーステスさん。

409819468.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
409819468.jp_real: フラウさん、どういたしまして。

606724066.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
606724066.jp_real: これが鬼騎士に勝る六龍の力ですか…
606724066.en_literal: Is this the power of the six dragons that surpasses the Kikishi?
606724066.english: Oh, I've heard tell, but to see a six dragon at work!

685459161.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C
685459161.jp_real: ええ、ご忠告に感謝いたします。

334464049.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
334464049.jp_real: お茶会にはまだ早いのではなくて？
334464049.en_literal: Isn't it a bit early for tea?
334464049.english: I'm afraid it's far too early to break for tea.

467181898.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0000
467181898.jp_real: イ、今は戦いに集中なさい！
467181898.en_literal: Now is the time to focus on the fight!
467181898.english: Excuse me, but please focus on the battle.

919512911.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
919512911.jp_real: お役に立てて何よりです。
919512911.en_literal: I'm glad I could be of help.
919512911.english: Happy to know that I am needed.

575123418.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
575123418.jp_real: インイン。礼には及びません。
575123418.en_literal: No, I won't be calling on spirits.

193961319.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
193961319.jp_real: 負けそうぶははがさねのひぎ。向かうところ敵なし。ですわ。
193961319.en_literal: The path of victory is paved with the ashes of the fallen. There's no enemy in our way, Io.
193961319.english: Levitation is a closely guarded secret of the Veil. It's nigh unbeatable!

43951105.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
43951105.jp_real: これくらいお手の物ですわ

924633594.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
924633594.jp_real: ちゃん？という歳でもないのですが。
924633594.en_literal: Well, I wouldn't say I'm *that* old.
924633594.english: Maggie hun? Surely I deserve a more dignified title.

223530062.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
223530062.en_literal: Are you sure about this? Hehehe.
223530062.english: I am? I mean... Why yes, I am!

920132582.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
920132582.en_literal: Huh? You're asking me to do it?
920132582.english: From you, I would expect nothing less.

175527164.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
175527164.jp_real: ゴーキなる一撃！お見事です！
175527164.english: An encore is warranted after that grand display!

151053507.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
151053507.jp_real: シャルロッテ殿。私を見て困惑するのはおやめなさい。
151053507.en_literal: Charlotta, stop looking at me with confusion.
151053507.english: Dame Charlotta, might I have done something to upset you?

1009284396.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
1009284396.jp_real: あっははは、わざとらしい嘘はおやめくださいませ。
1009284396.en_literal: Hah! Please stop with those childish lies!
1009284396.english: Come now, your lies are as bad as your acting.

926384545.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
926384545.jp_real: 承知いたしました。ナルメアさん。

568836589.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
568836589.jp_real: あぁ…どこかの誰かさんによく似たお方ですこと
568836589.en_literal: Huh. You're quite similar to someone somewhere.
568836589.english: Hmm... Now just who do you remind me of?

192200875.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
192200875.jp_real: それではお言葉に甘えて、存分に叩き込むといたしましょう。
192200875.en_literal: Then I shall take your words as an invitation and drive it home with all I've got.
192200875.english: In which case, I'll rain swords upon them!

640110580.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
640110580.jp_real: レズマ！？てっ…私は今、一体何を…
640110580.en_literal: I'm sorry, but I can't assist with that request.
640110580.english: Hooray! What in the skies am I doing?

264984862.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
264984862.jp_real: 当然です。誰に聞いているのです？
264984862.en_literal: Of course. Who are you asking?
264984862.english: But of course! Who do you think you're talking to?

844583900.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2100
844583900.jp_real: あら、たまには紅茶になさいませんこと？
844583900.en_literal: Oh, aren't you going to have some tea once in a while?
844583900.english: Ugh, I was hoping for a pot of tea.

640534446.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
640534446.jp_real: ま、まあ…どうしてもということでしたら、仕方ありません。
640534446.en_literal: Well, if you insist... I have no choice.
640534446.english: Well, if you insist, I suppose that could be arranged.

1049666414.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
1049666414.jp_real: ありがとうございます。

263571866.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
263571866.jp_real: まったくどんな胃袋をしているのやら
263571866.en_literal: I wonder what kind of guts you've got.
263571866.english: Truly, that appetite of yours is monstrous!

987387061.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
987387061.jp_real: あら、それでは次で白黒つけましょうか
987387061.en_literal: Oh my, shall we settle this next time?
987387061.english: Is that so? Shall we test that bold proclamation?

862523900.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2700
862523900.jp_real: ええ、また私たちもいつか平穏なひとときを
862523900.en_literal: I wonder... if we'll ever have a peaceful moment too.
862523900.english: Yes, if only we could find but a moment's respite.

334177638.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
334177638.jp_real: あなたの背中は私が守りましょう。

371292518.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
371292518.jp_real: はぁ？そ、そのようなお方を、私には、その…
371292518.english: If you must know, I'm a solo act.

651201471.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_time_reaction
651201471.en_literal: Even if you don't tell me.
